title: Hay que educar a Niní
writer: Luis César Amadori, Tito Davison, René Garzón
actors: Niní Marshall, Francisco Álvarez, Pablo Palitos
plot: Niní is an unemployed actress hired by two lawyers to pretend to be the daughter of a man of money. Lawyers try to blackmail him by inventing him an unrecognized daughter of a past affair. Without realizing it, Niní finishes in a ...
